monster.name: Avatar of Slaughter
languages: All languages known before the curse

trait.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The Avatar of Slaughter has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Imprison in Weapon
entries: When the Avatar of Slaughter is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by a melee Weapon Attack by a creature within 5 feet, its spirit infests the weapon that struck the blow. The weapon gains the properties and Curse associated with a {@item Berserker Axe|XDMG}, though it retains its original weapon type. Additionally, while the curse remains the weapon is sentient and can telepathically communicate with any creature that wields it, encouraging violence and malice.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Avatar of Slaughter has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If the Avatar of Slaughter is destroyed, and not imprisoned in a weapon, it reforms and regains all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in {@dice 1d6} days unless a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell is cast on its remains.

trait.name: Silver Weakness
entries: Damage dealt by Silver weapons ignores the avatar's {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The Avatar of Slaughter's {@variantrule Long Jump|XPHB} is up to 60 feet and its {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB} is up to 30 feet, with or without a running start.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Avatar of Slaughter makes four Fist attacks. It can replace one attack with a Gore attack.

action.name: Fist
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d8 + 8}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the Avatar of Slaughter moved at least 20 feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Piercing damage and has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the target's next turn.

monster.name: Bloated Gastromorph
languages: All languages known before the curse

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The Bloated Gastromorph regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. If the Bloated Gastromorph takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the Bloated Gastromorph's next turn. The Bloated Gastromorph dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The Bloated Gastromorph can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Bloated Gastromorph makes three Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tongue attack.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Slashing damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) and is moved up to 5 feet toward the Bloated Gastromorph.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

If the Bloated Gastromorph takes 40 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, it regurgitates all swallowed creatures at the end of that turn, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the gastromorph and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the Bloated Gastromorph dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Tongue {@recharge 5}
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 25 ft., one target. {@h}31 ({@damage 4d12 + 5}) Acid damage. A creature that is hit by this attack is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition and is moved up to 20 feet toward the gastromorph. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

bonus.name: Swallow
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 17}, one Large or smaller creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the gastromorph (it can have up to two creatures swallowed at a time). {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed by the gastromorph, and the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition ends. A swallowed creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the gastromorph, and taks 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Acid damage at the start of each of the gastromorph's turns.

monster.name: Body Snatcher
languages: all languages known before the curse
and all languages known by its host

trait.name: Electric Invigoration
entries: Whenever a Body Snatcher would take Lightning damage, it absorbs the energy and instead gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the damage, rounded down. The Body Snatcher also immediately recharges its Electric Torrent ability.

trait.name: Skin Sack
entries: The Body Snatcher is physically indistinguishable from its host and cannot be detected by nonmagical means. If the Body Snatcher is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and it has been inside its current host for less than 24 hours, the host regurgitates it then has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition and 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Body Snatcher makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Invade
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 15}; one Humanoid creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the Body Snatcher. {@actSaveFail} The Body Snatcher departs its current host and moves into the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} creature. It then regains all {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and recharges Electric Torrent. If it had been inside its previous host for less than 24 hours, that creature has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition and 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}. Otherwise, the previous host body becomes a lifeless skin sack.

action.name: Electric Torrent {@recharge 5}
entries: The Body Snatcher unleashes a large electric pulse. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each other creature within 20 feet of the Body Snatcher. {@actSaveFail} 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Lightning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Dream Whisperer
languages: all languages known before the curse

trait.name: Aura of Confusion
entries: A creature that starts its turn or moves within 25 feet of a Dream Whisperer must succeed on a {@dc 13} Intelligence saving throw or be affected as if they had failed a save against the {@spell Confusion|XPHB} spell.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Dream Whisperer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The Dream Whisperer can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Dream Whisperer makes three Claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave int} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The Dream Whisperer gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against the target for 1 minute, and the target rolls on the Lost Memories table.

entries.caption: Lost Memories
outro: A {@spell Remove Curse|XPHB} spell reverses this effect and restores the victim's memory.
rows: The target becomes deeply suspicious of a character or NPC of the GM's choice. They gain the following flaw: "I know they are seeking to betray me. I have to act first—it's me or them!"
The target forgets all memories of a loved one of the GM's choice. The next time the target sees them, it's as if they are meeting them for the first time.
The target becomes stricken with doubt and gains the following flaw: ""The world is out to get me, and I can't win. I may as well give up now."
The target forgets how to speak in one language known, decided by the GM.
The target forgets the location of something important to them, of the GM's choice. It may be the location of a goal, their home settlement, or a hidden treasure.
The target loses an inconsequential memory such as what they ate a few nights ago or the name of an unimportant NPC.

monster.name: Herald of Calamity
languages: all languages known before the curse

trait.name: Aura of Calamity
entries: An aura of misfortune surrounds the herald in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Creatures other than the herald within the area have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@dice d20} Tests. Whenever a creature in the area other than the herald takes damage from any source other than another creature (such as a trap, a hazard, or a fall), it takes the maximum possible damage.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The Herald of Calamity can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Invisibility
entries: The Herald of Calamity has the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition unless it is in an area illuminated by moonlight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Herald of Calamity makes two Life Drain attacks.

action.name: Life Drain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d8 + 3}) Necrotic damage, and the Herald of Calamity regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the amount of Necrotic damage dealt.

reaction.name: Mishap
entries: {@actTrigger} An attack roll against the Herald of Calamity hits it. {@actResponse} The herald gains a +6 bonus to {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} against the triggering attack. If this causes the attack to miss, it is redirected to a creature of the Herald's choice within 5 feet of it. Use the original attack roll to determine the success of the redirected attack.

trait.name: Displacement
entries: Attack rolls against the Mind Siphon have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}, since it projects an illusion that makes it appear near its actual location. This trait is suppressed while the Mind Siphon has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Mind Siphon has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The Mind Siphon can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Mind Siphon makes two Tentacle Tongue attacks at different targets.

action.name: Tentacle Tongue
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. {@h}26 ({@damage 5d8 + 4}) Psychic damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from the Mind Siphon's Tentacle Tongue, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the Grapple ends. The Mind Siphon can Grapple up to two creatures at the same time.

action.name: Consume Head {@recharge 6}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by Tentacle Tongue. {@actSaveFail} 44 ({@damage 8d10}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If this damage reduces the target to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the Mind Siphon kills it and devours its head.

action.name: Synaptic Eruption {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 16}, each creature within 30 feet of the Mind Siphon. {@actSaveFail} 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the Mind Siphon's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

monster.name: Plague Carrion
languages: all languages known before the curse

trait.name: Cloud of Blight
entries: A miasma surrounds the Plague Carrion in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Each time another creature starts its turn or enters the area, it gains a -1 penalty to damage rolls. Multiple instances of this penalty stack, but a creature can't gain it more than once each round. The penalty is removed when the creature finishes a {@variantrule Alternative Resting System|GrimHollowCG24|Quick}, {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short}, or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

trait.name: Death Burst
entries: When the Plague Carrion dies, it explodes in a cloud of sickening gas. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} centered on the Plague Carrion. {@actSaveFail} 27 ({@damage 6d8}) Poison damage, and the creature's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to half the Poison damage taken (rounding down). {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.
The {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum reduction lasts until the creature finishes a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Plague Carrion makes one Bite attack and one Plague Touch attack, or two Plague Beam attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Plague Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}49 ({@damage 10d8 + 4}) Poison damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to half the Poison damage taken (rounding down).

action.name: Plague Beam
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8} to hit, range 60 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the Plague Carrion's next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Plague Carrion casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material component and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks):

monster.name: Sightless Agony
languages: all languages known before the curse

trait.name: Shared Agony
entries: When a Sightless Agony takes damage, it emits a wave of energy, causing each creature within 5 feet of it to take an amount of Psychic damage equal to half the triggering damage (rounding down).

trait.name: Stunted Flight
entries: When a Sightless Agony chooses to fly, it must land by the end of its turn or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Sightless Agony makes one Bite attack, two Claw attacks, and one Tail attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Psychic damage. If both Claw attacks hit the same creature, the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}). Checks made to escape the grapple have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Psychic damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Wave of Agony (1/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} The Sightless Agony becomes {@status Bloodied|XPHB}. {@actResponse} {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, each creature within a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 10d8}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Verminous Abomination
languages: all languages known before the curse

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The Verminous Abomination can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 10-foot-wide, 10-foot-high tunnel in its wake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Verminous Abomination makes two attacks: one with its Bite and one with its Claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Poison damage and have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Birth Ratlings {@recharge 5}
entries: The Verminous Abomination spawns {@dice 1d4+2} {@creature Swarm of Rats|XMM} within 5 feet of it. The swarms may immediately move and use actions. On later turns, they move and take actions on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} as the Verminous Abomination.

trait.name: Alluring Cry
entries: The cry of the Weeping Willow attracts creatures in a 120-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} from the willow. At the start of each of its turns, a creature within the area must succeed on a {@dc 18} Charisma save or have the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 hour. On a success, the target is immune to this Weeping Willow's Alluring Cry for 24 hours.

While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target also has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. On each of its turns, a {@condition Charmed|XPHB} creature must use its movement to approach the Weeping Willow by the most direct route, stopping when it is within 5 feet of the Weeping Willow. It doesn't avoid {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}, but if this movement would obviously cause damage (such as by walking through fire), the creature repeats the save before entering that space.

trait.name: Deep Rooted
entries: The Weeping Willow is immune to effects that would move it.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Weeping Willow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Weeping Willow makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d10 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Lignify
entries: {@actSave con}, one creature within 5 feet: {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Petrified|XPHB} condition instead of the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, becoming a tree permanently. {@spell Greater Restoration|XPHB} or similar magic returns an affected creature to their original form.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Weeping Willow casts one of the following spells without the need for components, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Silver Tongue
entries: The Trade Factor has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@skill Deception|XPHB}, {@skill Insight|XPHB}, and {@skill Persuasion|XPHB} checks when discussing trade deals or contracts.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Trade Factor makes two attacks using its Rapier.

action.name: Rapier
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage, plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Gold Talks
entries: The Trade Factor throws 10 GP to creature within 30 feet. The creature must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or gain the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of the factor's next turn.

reaction.name: Paper Shield (1/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature that the Trade Factor can see makes an attack roll against the factor. {@actResponse} The Trade Factor produces a legal document sealed with a magical ward and imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attacker's roll.

trait.name: Academic Specialty
entries: The Preceptor has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all ability checks using their chosen specialty and gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to a type of damage.

items: Biothurge, Master of Warbreed: Medicine, Poison
Blastwright, Master of Machines: Arcana, Fire
Decosopher, Master of Alchemy: Nature, Acid

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Preceptor makes three Scalpel attacks. It can replace one Scalpel attack with an Acid Flask, Incendiary Bomb, or Neurotoxic Cloud.

action.name: Scalpel
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) Slashing damage, plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.

action.name: Acid Flask (Decosopher)
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Acid damage and 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Acid damage at the end of the target's next turn.

action.name: Incendiary Bomb (Blastwright)
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., {@h}18 ({@damage 4d8}) Fire damage and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Neurotoxic Cloud (Biothurge)
entries: Targets in a 20-ft. Cone take 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage and have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. If the target succeeds on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw, it takes half damage and is not {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Impromptu Golem (Biothurge, 1/Day)
entries: The biothurge turns a twisted mass spare bodies parts into a {@b {@creature Zombie|XMM}}. The zombie lasts until the end of the biothurge's next turn or until it is destroyed. The biothurge can use a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to extend the duration for 1 round.

bonus.name: Latent Decoction (Decosopher, 1/Day)
entries: The decosopher activates a potion stored in its blood stream. The decosopher is affected by its choice of: {@i Haste, Healing (Superior), Speed, or Water Breathing}.

bonus.name: Magitek Interference (Blastwright, 1/Day)
entries: The blastwright enjoins a magical item or golem to cease functioning until the beginning of the blastwright's next turn. If the item is held or is a creature, a successful {@dc 17} Intelligence saving throw resists the interference.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Preceptor casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}, +9 to hit with spell attacks):

items.name: Academic Specialty: Master of Warbreed
entries: The Preceptor has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all ability checks using {@skill Medicine|XPHB}  and gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Poison.

items.name: Academic Specialty: Master of Machines
entries: The Preceptor has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all ability checks using {@skill Arcana|XPHB}  and gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Fire.

items.name: Academic Specialty: Master of Alchemy
entries: The Preceptor has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all ability checks using {@skill Nature|XPHB}  and gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Acid.

trait.name: Arms Expert
entries: The Veteran can don or doff its {@item Shield|XPHB} whenever it changes weapons.

trait.name: Group Discipline
entries: The Veteran has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all saving throws if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet and both the Veteran and the ally don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Individual Skill
entries: The first time on a turn that the Veteran deals damage with an attack, the attack deals an additional {@damage 1d8} damage if the Veteran has no allies within 5 feet of it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Veteran makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Arms Expert
entries: The Veteran can don or doff its {@item Shield|XPHB} whenever it changes weapons.

trait.name: Group Discipline
entries: The Veteran has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all saving throws if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet and both the Veteran and the ally don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Individual Skill
entries: The first time on a turn that the Veteran deals damage with an attack, the attack deals an additional {@damage 1d8} damage if the Veteran has no allies within 5 feet of it.

trait.name: Power Shot
entries: The first time the archer deals damage with a Ranged Weapon on its turn, it deal an additional 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Piercing damage to the target, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet until the end of the archer's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Veteran makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Arms Expert
entries: The Veteran can don or doff its {@item Shield|XPHB} whenever it changes weapons.

trait.name: Group Discipline
entries: The Veteran has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all saving throws if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet and both the Veteran and the ally don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Individual Skill
entries: The first time on a turn that the Veteran deals damage with an attack, the attack deals an additional {@damage 1d8} damage if the Veteran has no allies within 5 feet of it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Veteran makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Battlemage casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material component and using Intelligence as its spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}).

trait.name: Arms Expert
entries: The Veteran can don or doff its {@item Shield|XPHB} whenever it changes weapons.

trait.name: Group Discipline
entries: The Veteran has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all saving throws if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet and both the Veteran and the ally don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Individual Skill
entries: The first time on a turn that the Veteran deals damage with an attack, the attack deals an additional {@damage 1d8} damage if the Veteran has no allies within 5 feet of it.

trait.name: Poisonous Blade
entries: The first time the infiltrator deals damage with a Melee Weapon on its turn, it deals an additional 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the infiltrator's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Veteran makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Arms Expert
entries: The Veteran can don or doff its {@item Shield|XPHB} whenever it changes weapons.

trait.name: Group Discipline
entries: The Veteran has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all saving throws if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet and both the Veteran and the ally don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Individual Skill
entries: The first time on a turn that the Veteran deals damage with an attack, the attack deals an additional {@damage 1d8} damage if the Veteran has no allies within 5 feet of it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Veteran makes two Longsword or Longbow attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Acid Bomb (2/day)
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) Acid damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only. Success or Fail: The area becomes Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until dispersed by a Strong wind.

trait.name: Arms Expert
entries: The captain can don or doff its {@item Shield|XPHB} whenever it changes weapons.

trait.name: Field Commander
entries: Allies within 60 feet who can see or hear the captain have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all saving throws.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The captain makes three attacks using Longsword or Longbow in any combination.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Tactical Advance
entries: Each Free Swords ally within 30 feet of the captain can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

reaction.name: Tactical Response
entries: {@actTrigger} The captain or a Free Swords ally that the captain can see is hit by an attack roll. {@actResponse} The captain commands one Free Swords ally within 90 feet who can see or hear the captain to use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to its {@condition Speed|XPHB} and make one Weapon Attack against the attacking creature.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The enforcer makes two attacks using their Dagger and Fighting Chain in any combination.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Fighting Chain
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). The enforcer can only have one creature grappled by its fighting chain.

bonus.name: Strangle
entries: The enforcer deals 4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage to a target {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by its {@item Fighting Chain|GrimHollowPG24}, and the target is unable to speak until the start of the enforcer's next turn or until it is no longer {@condition Grappled|XPHB}.

trait.name: Customized Poison
entries: The assassin prepares and applies specialized poisons to its weapons. The first time each turn that the assassin deals weapon damage to a creature, choose one of the following:

items.name: Abduction
items.entry: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. The condition ends if the target takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. {@actSaveSuccess} The target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

items.name: Debilitation
items.entry: The target takes 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Poison damage, and has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of the assassin's next turn.

items.name: Suffocation
items.entry: The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way, the target can't speak or breathe.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The assassin makes three attacks using its Daggers or one attack using its Heavy Crossbow.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 4d4 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9} to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The assassin takes the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

reaction.name: Smoke Bomb (2/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} The assassin takes damage from another creature. {@actResponse} The assassin creates smoke in a 20-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere}. The area becomes {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong wind. As part of this {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}, the assassin can move up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

monster.name: Thaumaturge Initiated
languages: one regional language plus three other languages

trait.name: Disguise Other
entries: When the initiated casts {@spell Disguise Self|XPHB}, it can choose to have it affect up to 3 additional creatures (including {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostiles}) that it can see within 60 feet. It can choose the same or different disguises for each affected creature. When cast in this manner, the effect lasts for 1 minute or until the initiated chooses to dismiss it from that creature.

trait.name: Personalized Arcane Burst
entries: Each initiated is specialized in one pair of damage types from the following list:
When the initiated uses the Arcane Burst action, it can choose to change the attack's damage type from Force to one of the two selected damage types.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The initiated makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

action.name: Arcane Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft., one target. {@h}17 ({@damage 3d8 + 4}) Force damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The initiated casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

bonus.name: Malignant Transposition (3/Day)
entries: The initiated creates clouds in a 5-ft radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} in its space and in up to three additional spaces it can see within 60 feet. The Spheres are {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} except to the initiated. The Spheres last until the start of the initiate's next turn, or they can be dispersed by a strong wind.

When the clouds appear, the initiated can target one creature in one cloud with the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The creature swaps places with the initiated. The initiated can also teleport themselves to an unoccupied space within one of the other clouds.

reaction.name: Arcane Reflection (3/Day)
entries: The initiated casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. If the triggering attack misses and it is a spell or {@variantrule Magical Effect|XPHB}, the initiated can immediately end the {@spell Shield|XPHB} spell to have the triggering attack target another creature within range of the spell's originator.

monster.name: Thaumaturge Archmage
languages: one regional language plus five other languages

trait.name: Collaborative Rift Control
entries: When multiple Thaumaturge Archmages capable of creating and controlling Arcane Rifts are present, they can interact with each other's rifts, and for every additional Thaumaturge Archmage, the maximum possible level of each rift increases by 2, up to a maximum of 15.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the archmage fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The archmage has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Personalized Arcane Burst
entries: Each archmage is specialized in one pair of damage types from the following list:
When the archmage uses the Arcane Burst action, it can choose to change the attack's damage type from Force to one of the two selected damage types.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The archmage makes four Arcane Burst attacks or makes two Arcane Burst attacks and uses the Spellcasting action.

action.name: Arcane Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 150 ft., one target. {@h}27 ({@damage 4d10 + 5}) Force damage and the creature is pushed back 10 feet.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The archmage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

bonus.name: Misty Step
entries: The archmage casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

reaction.name: Arcane Contingency
entries: {@actTrigger} The archmage is reduced to 40 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or less. {@actResponse} The archmage can cast {@spell Dimension Door|XPHB}. This does not consume a use of the spell.

reaction.name: Arcane Countermeasure
entries: {@actTrigger} The archmage is targeted by a spell, or the archmage is in the area of effect of a spell being cast. {@actResponse} The archmage casts {@spell Shield|XPHB} or {@spell Counterspell|XPHB}, or casts {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB} targeting a spell in response to seeing that spell take effect. The archmage uses the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The archmage uses the Spellcasting action.

legendary.name: Create Arcane Rift (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The archmage creates a level 5 Arcane Rift in an unoccupied space the archmage can see within 120 feet. The Arcane Rift is a Large magical object, which hovers, has 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} per Arcane Rift level, and has an {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} of 17. In addition to standard object properties, the Arcane Rift is Resistant to damage from spells and spell effects and is  {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immune} to all conditions.
Creatures within 30 feet of the Arcane Rift treat all movement away from the Arcane Rift as {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}.

The Arcane Rift can be dispelled with a {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB} spell, treating the Arcane Rift's level as its spell level. It can also be destroyed if targeted by a {@spell Disintegrate|XPHB} spell.

items.name: Infuse Arcane Rift
entries: The archmage increases the level of one Arcane Rift it can see within 120 feet by 2, up to a maximum level of 9.

items.name: Ignite Arcane Rift
entries: The archmage causes one Arcane Rift it can see within 120 feet to expand to Huge or Gargantuan size before exploding, destroying the Arcane Rift. All creatures within 30 feet are subjected to the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Force damage per Arcane Rift level. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

items.name: Arcane Rift Summoning
entries: The archmage targets one Arcane Rift it can see within 120 feet, funneling its magic to cast {@spell Summon Dragon|XPHB} using the Arcane Rift level as the Spell Slot level, destroying the Arcane Rift in the process. Upon summoning, the archmage can change the summoned creature's creature type to any of the following: Aberration, Beast, Elemental, Fiend, or Monstrosity. This casting requires no somatic or material components.

monster.name: Watchful Priest
languages: one regional language plus one other language

trait.name: Enraging Sacrifice
entries: When the priest dies, each ally within 20 feet who can see the priest gains 10 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} and a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls for 1 minute.

trait.name: Zealous Aura
entries: The priest radiates an aura of zeal in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it. Each ally in the area has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} checks, and their successful attacks deal an extra {@damage 1d4} Radiant damage. This aura becomes inactive if the priest has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The priest makes two Castigating Word attacks.

action.name: Castigating Word
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage, and one ally of the priest within 20 feet of the target can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make a melee attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

bonus.name: Righteous Morale (1/Day)
entries: The priest chooses up to three other creatures it can see within 20 feet of it. Each target regains 4 ({@damage 1d8}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and has  {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions until the start of the priest's next turn.

monster.name: High Priest
languages: one regional language plus two other languages

trait.name: Enraging Sacrifice
entries: When the priest dies, each ally within 40 feet who can see the priest gains 20 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} and a +4 bonus to attack and damage rolls for 1 hour.

trait.name: Zealous Aura
entries: The priest radiates an aura of zeal in a 40-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it. Each ally in the area has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} checks, and their successful attacks deal an extra {@damage 3d6} Radiant damage. This aura becomes inactive if the priest has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The high priest makes three Sharp Rebuke attacks.

action.name: Sharp Rebuke
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Radiant damage, and one ally of the priest within 20 feet of the target can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to regain 9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and make a melee attack.

action.name: Call Soldiers of the Faith
entries: The high priest calls forth celestials that take the form of {@dice 1d4 + 1||Warrior Veterans} {@creature Warrior Veteran|XMM|Warrior Veterans} or {@dice 1d3||Lions} {@creature Lion|XMM|Lions} that enter the {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} at the end of the high priest's turn. The celestials follow the priest's commands and remain for 1 minute or until slain.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}):

bonus.name: Inspiring Monologue (3/Day)
entries: The priest chooses any number of allies within 60 feet who can hear the priest. Until the end of the priest's next turn, each target has  {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB}, and {@condition Frightened|XPHB} conditions and does not provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

reaction.name: To Me!
entries: {@actTrigger} The priest is attacked or targeted by a spell. {@actResponse} The high priest chooses a Small or Medium ally within 5 feet of itself. The priest and that ally swap places, and the ally gains 10 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} and becomes the target of the attack or spell instead.
